data.title: RED: Create test_review_stats.py for aggregation logic
data.description:
## Description

Create tests/scripts/test_review_stats.py with pytest tests for the Python review-stats aggregation module. Tests call functions from review_stats module which does not exist yet — all should FAIL (RED).

Test functions (6):
- test_read_events_valid_jsonl: Read fixture JSONL files, assert correct event count
- test_read_events_skips_malformed: Fixture with 1 valid + 1 malformed line → reads 1 event, logs warning
- test_compute_pass_fail_rates: 3 passed + 1 failed review_result events → pass_rate=75%, fail_rate=25%
- test_compute_avg_dimension_scores: Fixture with known scores → assert averages match
- test_compute_finding_severity_distribution: Fixture with mixed severities → correct count per severity
- test_time_window_filtering: Events spanning 60 days, 30-day window → only recent 30 days included

## TDD Requirement
RED — review_stats.py module does not exist.

## Test Approach
Create fixture JSONL files in temp dir. Import review_stats functions, call with fixture paths, assert return values match expected metrics.

## Files to Modify
- tests/scripts/test_review_stats.py (create)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file syntactically valid. Verify: python3 -m py_compile tests/scripts/test_review_stats.py
- [ ] 6+ test functions. Verify: grep -c "def test_" tests/scripts/test_review_stats.py | awk '{exit ($1 < 6)}'
